The world loves coal. That is the simple message from results showing new coal-fired power plants hit a global 10-year high in 2025, defying climate doomers who decry its use and long for wind farms, solar panels and hydro power everywhere.

news-global-econ.title: Exclusive: Chip Roy Issues Plan to Tax Illegal Aliens at 25% for Remittances
news-global-econ.description:
Rep. Chip Roy is introducing legislation to tax illegal aliens at 25 percent on remittances they send back to their native countries.
The post Exclusive: Chip Roy Issues Plan to Tax Illegal Aliens at 25% for Remittances appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Financial Software Giant Intuit Lays Off 17% of Workforce as It Embraces AI

news-global-econ.title: Obama’s baseball outing with Castro reignites fury after Trump DOJ drops hammer on Cuban leader
news-global-econ.description: Photos of Obama embracing Raul Castro in Havana resurface after DOJ indictment charges the former Cuban president in the 1996 shootdown of two planes.

news-global-soc.description: A humanoid robot dancing to Michael Jackson's "Billie Jean" at a store in Shenzhen, China, wipes out on stage in a hilariously viral video clip.

news-global-soc.title: Josh Duhamel leans into Western cowboy role after decades of heartthrob roles
news-global-soc.description: Josh Duhamel is reviving his career with Western cowboy roles including Paramount's "The Rescue" after leaving Los Angeles for off-grid life in Montana.
